label: Reliquary Stock Vault
description: Reliquary Stock Vault serves as the secured storage chamber behind The Pallid Reliquary’s blast-rated frontage, enclosed by ribbed ferrocrete and a single pressure-sealed access point. Ration-tin shelving rises to the ceiling in regimented bays, while pressure-clamped crates and cog-marked bins are strapped to wall rails for rapid lock-down. Stenciled inventory codes and hazard sigils cover the shelving uprights, aligning stockkeeping with the enclave’s siege protocols. Recessed lumen strips cast an unwavering, cold light over machine-oil residue and preservative salt dust ground into the deck plating.
